name: Sneha Kaushal

suggestions.text: Keep resume to 1-2 pages for best results
Tailor your resume for each job application

interview_questions.q: How do you stay updated with new technologies?
interview_questions.tip: Mention specific sources: blogs, GitHub, courses, side projects

interview_questions.q: What is event delegation in JavaScript?
interview_questions.tip: Explain bubbling and how it improves performance

interview_questions.q: How do you handle tight deadlines and pressure?
interview_questions.tip: Give a real example, mention prioritization and communication

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between == and === in JavaScript?
interview_questions.tip: Type coercion vs strict equality

interview_questions.q: What is git cherry-pick?
interview_questions.tip: Applying specific commits from one branch to another

interview_questions.q: How do you resolve a merge conflict?
interview_questions.tip: Walk through the steps: identify, edit, stage, commit

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, and RIGHT JOIN?
interview_questions.tip: Draw a Venn diagram mentally and explain with example tables

interview_questions.q: What is your greatest technical weakness?
interview_questions.tip: Pick a real weakness but show you're actively working on it

interview_questions.q: Describe your experience working in a team.
interview_questions.tip: Mention collaboration tools, conflict resolution, code reviews

interview_questions.q: Explain closures with a practical example.
interview_questions.tip: Use counter or private variable pattern example

interview_questions.q: Explain REST API design principles.
interview_questions.tip: Stateless, resources as URLs, HTTP verbs, status codes

interview_questions.q: What are Python decorators and how do you use them?
interview_questions.tip: Explain with a real example like @login_required or @staticmethod

interview_questions.q: Explain Java's garbage collection mechanism.
interview_questions.tip: Mention JVM, heap, generations, and GC algorithms

interview_questions.q: What is Context API and when would you use it over Redux?
interview_questions.tip: Talk about prop drilling problem and scale

interview_questions.q: Explain multithreading in Java with synchronized keyword.
interview_questions.tip: Cover race conditions, deadlock, and thread safety

interview_questions.q: How does async/await work under the hood?
interview_questions.tip: Connect to Promises and the event loop

interview_questions.q: What are the SOLID principles?
interview_questions.tip: Name all 5 and give a brief example of each

interview_questions.q: Explain database normalization (1NF, 2NF, 3NF).
interview_questions.tip: Use a real table example to show each normal form

interview_questions.q: What is the GIL (Global Interpreter Lock) in Python?
interview_questions.tip: Mention threading limitations and multiprocessing as alternative

interview_questions.q: Explain the difference between lists, tuples, and sets in Python.
interview_questions.tip: Focus on mutability, ordering, and use-cases

interview_questions.q: What are React Hooks and why were they introduced?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with class components, mention useState/useEffect

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between EC2, Lambda, and ECS?
interview_questions.tip: VM vs serverless vs containers — explain when to use each

interview_questions.q: Explain S3 storage classes and their use cases.
interview_questions.tip: Standard, IA, Glacier — cost vs access frequency

interview_questions.q: What is a stored procedure and when would you use one?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with regular queries, mention security and reuse

interview_questions.q: Tell me about yourself and your technical background.
interview_questions.tip: Use the Present-Past-Future formula: current role/study → key experience → what you want to do

text:
Sneha Kaushal
+91-7717623925|kaushalsneha36@gmail.com|GitHub|LinkedIn
PROFILE
Computer Science undergraduate with strong interest in data analysis, AI systems, business intelligence, reporting, and
operational problem solving. Skilled in Python, SQL, dashboards, data validation, AI-assisted analysis, and structured
documentation. Experienced in converting raw data into insights, identifying patterns, building reports, and supporting
decision-making through analytical and technical projects.
EDUCATION
Chitkara University, Punjab, India 2023 – 2027
B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering CGPA: 8.32
TECHNICAL SKILLS
•Languages:Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL
•Data & Analytics:Data Cleaning, Data Validation, Reporting, Dashboards, Pattern Recognition, Operational Analysis
•AI Tools:ChatGPT, Gemini, AI-assisted Research, Prompting, AI-based Report Generation
•Frontend & Backend:React.js, HTML, CSS, Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, REST APIs
•Core Concepts:Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks
•Tools:Git, GitHub, Postman, Jira, Notion, MS Excel, PowerPoint, Maven
•Cloud & Additional Skills:AWS Cloud, Azure Fundamentals, API Testing, Debugging, Documentation
PROJECTS
AI Resume AnalyzerPython, Flask, PyPDF2, spaCy, scikit-learn
•Built an AI-assisted resume analysis system to extract resume content, identify skills, and compare profiles with job
descriptions.
•Used TF-IDF and cosine similarity to generate match scores and provide structured resume improvement insights.
•Created a workflow for PDF upload, text extraction, skill analysis, grammar feedback, and final reporting.
•Applied data cleaning, text processing, and analytical scoring to convert unstructured resumes into useful insights.
•Strengthened ability to review large text data, detect gaps, and generate decision-support reports.
AEGIS v3 – Global Multi-Domain Threat Detection PlatformReact, Node.js, Express, Socket.IO, Leaflet
•Developed a real-time dashboard to monitor global aviation and maritime activity using live data sources.
•Integrated OpenSky and AISHub APIs to collect, structure, and visualize operational data.
•Built AI-generated threat reports to summarize patterns and support faster decision-making.
•Designed dashboards for visibility, tracking, and structured reporting of real-time events.
•Improved analytical thinking by identifying signals from large volumes of live movement data.
Fitness Tracking Application React, Java
•Created a fitness tracking application with user activity management and progress visualization.
•Built dashboard-style frontend features to display user progress and activity insights.
•Developed backend services to handle user records, activity data, and analytics workflows.
•Applied structured data handling, reporting logic, and user-focused problem solving.
ACHIEVEMENTS
•Solved280+ Data Structures and Algorithms problemson LeetCode.
•Secured3rd Prize at CYBPRO-2025for an AI-based cybersecurity project.
CERTIFICATIONS
•Java Basic – HackerRank
•SQL Basic – HackerRank
•Python Certification – GeeksforGeeks
•Azure Cloud Fundamentals – Microsoft
•Building Cloud Computing Solutions at Scale – Coursera
SOFT SKILLS
Analytical Thinking Written Communication Attention to Detail Ownership Mindset Problem Solving
Confidentiality Adaptability Cross-functional Collaboration
